en_title: O Beloved: The Loving Heart's Word Awakens My Breast
en_body:
O Beloved..! Night has only now invited us, You..!!
You..O You..! Do you hear.. the wind urging moonlight to set sail..!?
You..O You..! Do you hear.. a million-winged stars sparkling like waves of sky..!?
You..O You..! The Light: a banquet table waiting:
Night and I: breasts lifted to welcome the Heart sounding more secretly than ever...
Heart and Love: like waves and the boundless Divine Ocean!
O, O Pearl-Beloved: how many solitary sufferings
End in one instant when the very light of night rejoices into Dream
Sorrow's music rings through all entanglements now interwoven
You..O You..! Your hidden tears, I drink them dry within one glad note
You..O You..! In your rose-red breast I hide from Life's storm, softer than Poetry!
Hide here, You: Heaven and Earth within my heart are vast!
Hide here, You: my Years and Months are all-embracing!
And, O You..! Let me nestle within your arms, please..
And, O You..! Let our lips no longer fear the word of Love..!!
Softly sobbing when our lips have only just pressed drunkenly close...
O, O Moon-and-Star Beloved: ended now is your Loneliness!
The whole blackness makes a frame for Light:
Calling You home to laugh and weep in Infinite Communion!
O Lover, like blood awakening waves within the Lotus-Heart..
The Heart knows how to cherish, embracing silk-veins of amorous sound
So blood still clasps the music through each quickening second
Pouring like fragrance, lifting the keys into overflowing Life:
Pouring like lullaby—O warm body of Love
Overflowing like an offering—O great Concerto making the soul bloom
Overflowing like flame kindling every manifesting vein of breath!
Love, please! Do not mind how the stars glitter
Love me..! Night knows how to call your Love!
Love each other more: even wind knows how to cling to cloud
Love each other deeply: blood gives the Heart its warming breath
Love each other forever: let Blood-and-Heart unite forever
Love me..! Night sends its message calling the two of us!
From the center of the rose-red Heart, blood floods the arteries
I open my heart, reaching, straining to call a thousand stars:
And the soul of night manifests the Light of Poetry
From scripture-stone of ten thousand years before
The Universe rings tenderly calling our names:
Stars covenanted us together from Eternity
Night gives Love: the Universe delivers its vow
That the feast of rejoicing holds Divine Light
Imprisoning You inside my trembling breast:
Becoming music-blood within my dreaming Heart..!!
And through all Space-Time forever after
Echoing Eternity: night's word calls the fragrant breast
I keep You captive within the tender cage:
O Lover rose-red as the lotus-heart
I am the music-blood beating You into rapture:
Night awakens with a thousand stars as witness
Love returns within You: and I receive the kiss!
note: The Lotus-Heart joins Buddhist lotus symbolism with the poem's sacred language of Divine Light, covenant, and communion.
